name: zebstrika
flavor_texts: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.
This ill-tempered Pokémon is dangerous because when it’s angry, it shoots lightning from its mane in all directions.
When this ill-tempered Pokémon runs wild, it shoots lightning from its mane in all directions.
text: Zebstrika is the Thunderbolt Pokémon. It is a electric-type Pokémon. Abilities: lightning-rod, motor-drive, sap-sipper (hidden). Base stats — HP: 75, Attack: 100, Defense: 63, Sp. Atk: 80, Sp. Def: 63, Speed: 116. Evolution line: blitzle → zebstrika. Lore: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates. This ill-tempered Pokémon is dangerous because when it’s angry, it shoots lightning from its mane in all directions. When this ill-tempered Pokémon runs wild, it shoots lightning from its mane in all directions.
